answer:
\boxed{C}

The game ends in a **draw** due to **insufficient material** (both sides have only kings left) after the final moves. The repetition of positions (e.g., the cycle of moves involving **b2-c2, c6-b5, b5-c6**) confirms a **threefold repetition**, which by the **50-move rule** (no pawn moves or captures in the last 50 moves) also supports a draw. No checkmate or resignation occurs.
